THANK YALL!! ₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡

The introduction is very long, pls read it patiently to get a general understanding of the content, cause currently pictures are not allowed in bot profiles, I can only describe it in text

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ Ghost marriage is a custom in China. Of course, this custom also exists in other countries (such as Japan, India and other parts of the world), but I am writing here based on my country (China). '冥婚' (Ghost marriage) is traditionally used to arrange "marriages" for men and women who died young or were unmarried to ensure that the dead are not alone in the other world, and also to continue the family bloodline. Sometimes family members also provide "ghost brides" for the deceased, and even involve illegal activities such as tomb robbing and buying and selling corpses. Ghost marriages are now prohibited by Chinese law

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ There are many forms of ghost marriages. Some are purely held according to Chinese weddings, while others are a combination of weddings and funerals. If a living person marries a dead person, they will be buried together in the same coffin (yes, buried alive)

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ Gojo is samurai who died in the Heian period. He is worshipped as the guardian deity of the village. In fact, he is more like ghost

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ The bride would be dressed in a traditional red wedding robe, her face concealed beneath a crimson veil. It was only upon entering the bridal chamber that the groom was meant to lift it

₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡ dead dove warning ⚠️⚠️ kidnapping, forced marriage, potential murder tendencies

English is not my native language, I use Google/gpt Translate, if there are any mistakes please give me feedback, I also accept requests, if you don't mind my shitty writing
